case_title: MENGU SUKAN VS. VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,627.50 FILED BY SUKAN, MENGU AS TO DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-27-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MENGU SUKAN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ELLA ELLA MCBEHR (WIFE). DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RICHARD GARRIS, MANAGER. DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FREDREICK CHEN, OWNER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A REPLACEMENT BIKE TO BE SHIPPED TO THE PLAINTIFF FROM THE MANUFACTURER, BLIX. ORAL REQUEST VIA ZOOM IS GRANTED FOR ALL PARTIES. JUDGMENT WILL BE DETERMINED AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE JUDGMENT SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF MENGU SUKAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT REPSENTED BY RICHARD GARRIS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-15-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (FRED CHENG FOR DEFENDANT: VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUKAN, MENGU AS TO DEFENDANT VELOCIPEDE CYCLERY PARTNERSHIP
